PMID: 38703334. DOI: 10.1007/s10548-024-01052-4. Score: 58. Mindfulness meditation is acontemplative practice that is informed by Buddhism. It has been proven effective for improving mental and physical health in clinical and non-clinical contexts. To date, mainstream dialogue and scientific research on mindfulness has focused primarily on short-term mindfulness training and applications of mindfulness for reducing stress.
